recommendations.title: Naked Among Wolves

recommendations.title: Hotel Rwanda
recommendations.overview: Inspired by true events, this film takes place in Rwanda in the 1990s when more than a million Tutsis were killed in a genocide that went mostly unnoticed by the rest of the world. Hotel owner Paul Rusesabagina houses over a thousand refuges in his h

recommendations.title: The Counterfeiters
recommendations.overview: The story of Jewish counterfeiter Salomon Sorowitsch, who was coerced into assisting the Nazi operation of the Sachsenhausen concentration camp during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Odessa File

recommendations.title: There's Still Tomorrow

recommendations.title: The Big Red One
recommendations.overview: A veteran sergeant of World War I leads a squad in World War II, always in the company of the survivor Pvt. Griff, the writer Pvt. Zab, the Sicilian Pvt. Vinci and Pvt. Johnson, in Vichy French Africa, Sicily, D-Day at Omaha Beach, Belgium and France

recommendations.title: My Best Friend Anne Frank
recommendations.overview: Based on the real-life friendship between Anne Frank and Hannah Goslar, from Nazi-occupied Amsterdam to their harrowing reunion in a concentration camp.

recommendations.title: The Reader

recommendations.title: The Photographer of Mauthausen

recommendations.title: Fatal Attraction
recommendations.overview: A married man's one-night stand comes back to haunt him when that lover begins to stalk him and his family.
